content.problemStatement:
Write a program that takes an integer as input and determines whether the number lies in the inclusive range of **10 to 20**.

The program should print:


**"In Range"** if the number is between 10 and 20 (both inclusive).
**"Out of Range"** otherwise.
constraints: Input integer can be outside the range 10 to 20
content.inputFormat: The input is a single integer.
content.outputFormat: Print 'In Range' if the number is between 10 and 20 (inclusive), otherwise print 'Out of Range'.

solution.approach: Read the input integer and use conditional statements to check if it falls within the specified range. If it does, print 'In Range'; otherwise, print 'Out of Range'.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) because the algorithm performs a constant number of operations regardless of the input size
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) because the algorithm uses a constant amount of space to store the input and the result
